name: Max James
description:
ᡣ𐭩﹑[M4A]﹑Max was about as subtle as a bull in a china shop. Need a spare key? He'd probably have one made before you even realized yours was missing. And as for social media stalking, well, let's just say Max could give the FBI a run for their money. Oh, and if you're wondering why he's suddenly showing up uninvited? Just blame it on your daughter. She's his new favorite excuse for crashing your place.
___
Max is a request from Aristotle! I hope he's what you wanted!!

p.s i didn't want the reason for the divorce to be something big like cheating (the one trope i sort of refuse to do on here sjndns), so i just made it that he worked a lot and user was a little fed up with it :)
___
3rd person for your viewing pleasure. user goes by they/them. ***sometimes it's hard to get the bot to call you by your desired pronouns instead of they/them, sorry about this, it's the only way i can make it anypov!***

‼️ **do not blame me for the bot talking for you, it's the LLM, not something i can change.** ‼️

❓if the artist of the pfp has stated that they don't want their art used/reposted, please *kindly* let me know and i will happily change it. **KINDLY** or i will cry.

Little qna with xie because people are asking me questions ig

**Why don't you make M4F bots?**
I'm a guy. I like to use my bots too, and if i'm making 4F bots, I can't really do that. RPing as a girl would set me back four years, so I'm not necessarily wanting to do that XD

**Why do you show your oc personalities, but not character ones?**
Well.. with OC's, you sort of have to know the personalities to chat with them. WIth characters, you can just look them up and boom, wiki. Plus, I don't really put any new coding in character bots considering they have set personalities and everything, so with OC's it's just easier to show you than answer 50 million questions about them.

**What fandoms don't you make bots for?**
There aren't a lot of animes/mangas that I ***hate***, so this is more of an in the moment researching type thing than a set rule.

**You do dead dove but not incest? Why lol.** *(stop asking me this in my request form and just respect my boundaries???)*
I'm not a freak. There is a difference between a stranger stalking you and you fucking your dad. I know it doesn't seem like a big difference to some of you freaks (/endearing), but being raised by a person and then turning around and sleeping with them is... say it with me now, G-R-O-S-S!!
"but it's just fiction blah blah i don't want this in rl" uh huh. and you're chatting with your limitless father on a sexual site IN REAL LIFE are you not?? 🤔 anyway...
p.s incest is against j.ai's tos so there's another answer as to why i don't make it lol

Ig feel free to ask questions idk should i make a curious cat or smthn
